productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Green Sweatshirt
description: Composition Green sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round ribbed neckline, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered and appliquéd branding on the chest and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Stay cosy in in all seasons with this stylish sweatshirt from US Polo. The soft blend of cotton/polyester fabric against your skin gives you exemplary comfort. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it over your Sports kit or over a t-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
